messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Role benchmarking, slice 1: one role, several models, end to end, producing a real report
What it solves: PROVENANCE — READ THIS FIRST. The framework spec is THE HUMAN'S OWN, not an Operator proposal.
Preserve his authorship. (BL-314 made the opposite mistake — attributing an Operator idea to the
human. Here the discipline runs the other way: this IS his, and his stated objectives are the
requirement, …
How it works: The same role task is run against several models from the same starting state
